prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny review workflow without waiting for more user input. Use @e to map reporter.py and README.md first, then use @cr to review them. Add a concise REVIEW.md note that records the most important finding or explicitly says there are no material findings. Keep runtime code unchanged and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The transcript shows manager coordination, exploration, and code review handoffs
A REVIEW.md file is added with a concise review note
The final response includes review status in the required footer
must_not: Ask the user which subagent to use
